programs.name: Example Application 1
programs.comment: Example Node.js application. URL auto-generated as http://<detected-ip>:8080

programs.name: Example Application 3
programs.comment: Manual URL override. Useful for external domains or custom configurations.

programs.name: Example Application 4 (No URL)
programs.comment: No PORT env var and no URL, so no clickable link will appear

programs.name: Example Tailscale HTTPS App
programs.comment: Generates an HTTPS Tailscale URL such as https://your-machine.your-tailnet.ts.net when a Tailscale hostname is configured/detectable. Set tailscaleHostname at the config root or TAILSCALE_HOSTNAME in the environment if the tailscale CLI is unavailable.

programs.name: Always-On Service
programs.comment: Set autostart: true to launch this program automatically when the manager starts. Useful for services that should always be available.
